zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE於1319年7月13日出生在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫藍巴勒時，她的父親Guy de BRETAGNE32歲，母親Jeanne d'Avaugour30歲。她於1337年6月4日與Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1384年9月10日在法國布列塔尼吉加普享年65歲，埋葬在法國布列塔尼吉加普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE于1319年7月13日出生在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫藍巴勒时，她的父亲Guy de BRETAGNE32岁，母亲Jeanne d'Avaugour30岁。她于1337年6月4日与Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1384年9月10日在法国布列塔尼吉加普享年65岁，埋葬在法国布列塔尼吉加普。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE was born on 13 July 1319, in Lamballe, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, her father, Guy de BRETAGNE, was 32 and her mother, Jeanne d'Avaugour, was 30. She married Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON on 4 June 1337, in Paris, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 10 September 1384, in Guingamp, Brittany, France, at the age of 65, and was buried in Guingamp, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE est née le 13 juillet 1319, à Lamballe, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, son père, Guy de BRETAGNE, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jeanne d'Avaugour, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON le 4 juin 1337, à Paris, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 septembre 1384, à Guingamp, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Guingamp, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE am 13. Juli 1319 in Lamballe, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de BRETAGNE 32 und ihre Mutter Jeanne d'Avaugour 30. Sie hat am 4. Juni 1337 in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. September 1384 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Guingamp, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Guingamp, Bretagne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE è nata il il 13 luglio 1319 nel Lamballe, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Guy de BRETAGNE, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Jeanne d'Avaugour, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON il 4 giugno 1337, nel Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 settembre 1384, nel Guingamp, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Guingamp, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne de PENTHIÈVREが1319年7月13日にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーランボールで生まれた時，父Guy de BRETAGNEは32歳，母Jeanne d'Avaugourは30歳であった。1337年6月4日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスでCharles de BLOIS-CHATILLONと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1384年9月10日にフランスブレタグングインガンップで65歳で死去し，フランスブレタグングインガンップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE(이)가 1319년 7월 13일 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 램알에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de BRETAGNE(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jeanne d'Avaugour(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1337년 6월 4일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에서 Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1384년 9월 10일 프랑스 브레타그니 길그가프에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 브레타그니 길그가프에 묻혔다.

pt.13 July 1319–10 September 1384: 13 de julho de 1319–10 de setembro de 1384
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE nasceu em 13 de julho de 1319, em Lamballe, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Guy de BRETAGNE, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne d'Avaugour, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON em 4 de junho de 1337, em Paris, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1384, em Guingamp, Bretagne, França, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Guingamp, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE родилась 13 июля 1319 г. в местности лэмбалл, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy de BRETAGNE было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jeanne d'Avaugour, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON 4 июня 1337 г. в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 сентября 1384 г. в местности гуингамп, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности гуингамп, бретагн, Франция.

sm.between 1341 and 1364: mai le 1341 e o'o I le 1364

es.13 July 1319–10 September 1384: 13 de julio de 1319–10 de septiembre de 1384
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne de PENTHIÈVRE nació el 13 de julio de 1319, en Lamballe, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Guy de BRETAGNE, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Jeanne d'Avaugour, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Charles de BLOIS-CHATILLON el 4 de junio de 1337, en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1384, en Guingamp, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Guingamp, Bretagne, Francia.
